title: ornithopus sativus
intro: Ornithopus sativus, also known as white bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, white flowers and trifoliate leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and isoflavones content. The health benefits of Ornithopus sativus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ornithopus sativus are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
